programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.title: L'instant mobile

programme.title: E1544
programme.desc: The Great Era gives a wide selection of Phoenix outstanding documentaries, covering different topics and issues in question, and capturing life as it is.

programme.title: E162
programme.desc: 'World Insight With Shih' is a weekly special program with in-depth political and economic commentary. The program consists of three segments: 'Viewing the World with Shih', 'Discussing the Past and Present' and 'Speaking New Words'. The senior commentator Shih Chi Ping analyzes the world's political and economic topics from a unique point of view, and deeply analyzes the global trends to audience.

programme.title: E479
programme.desc: CULTURAL CANVAS: Cultural Canvas is a flagship cultural program of Phoenix TV deeply beloved by young audiences as their window to engage with and understand traditional culture. Blending 'high culture with popular culture,' the program explores both tangible artifacts and intangible cultural heritage. It tackles major cultural topics with expansive perspectives, interpreting everyday cultural phenomena.

programme.title: Premium Spectacular: The Frontline of Hate: A True Account of Global Extreme Nationalism
programme.desc: Far-right forces are rising significantly worldwide. From al-Qaeda (AQ) in the Middle East to extremists within the German Special Forces Command (KSK), and neo-Nazi militants colluding with each other on the Ukrainian battlefield, right-wing extremism is infiltrating military and police systems, using the professional skills of veterans and active-duty soldiers to plan and carry out terrorist attacks and attempt to overthrow governments…

programme.title: E230
programme.desc: MY HONG KONG STORY: Each episode of My Hong Kong Story features a Hong Kong native, or those who surround their tale here. Interviewees convey their indigenized story in a personnel aspect. With a 15-minute essence per episode, the cinematic language brings a new perspective to observe Hong Kong for Chinese-speaking audience around the world. Everyone can have an indepth understanding of Hong Kong and its people.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 盛唐初年，氣象萬千；夜魅長安，業孽浮屠。光怪陸離之下盡是怪異之事，血雨腥風間暗藏獵殺危局。盛世奇譚，詭案揭幕。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 《不良執念清除師》描述高中生「蒲一永」（曾敬驊 飾）遭遇生死邊緣的車禍後陷入昏迷，醒來後意外擁有超能力，原本無聊的生活從此產生翻天覆地的改變，與菜鳥女警官「陳楮英」（宋芸樺 飾），以及校內死對頭「曹光硯」（彭千祐 飾）三人一同展開了一場奇幻又瘋狂的打怪旅程。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 盛唐初年，氣象萬千；夜魅長安，業孽浮屠。光怪陸離之下盡是怪異之事，血雨腥風間暗藏獵殺危局。盛世奇譚，詭案揭幕。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: E3022-086
programme.desc: Japan boasts a thousand colour names, unmatched worldwide. Uncover the colour revolution sparked by women in the 11th century as seen through the elegant kimono known as the 'juni-hitoe'.

programme.title: E6217-001
programme.desc: Join our explorers as they pursue the cinematic beauty of Japan - in this episode, Kyle Card hikes the newly-designated long trail around majestic Mount Fuji and discovers its secrets.

programme.title: E6030-010
programme.desc: A Bedtime Routine: On hot and humid summer nights, nothing can get in the way of sleep like mosquitoes - we learn about the tools Edo townspeople had at their disposal to fight these pesky insects.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: E2090-027
programme.desc: Lava Flows: The hazard map for Mount Fuji was revised in 2021, revealing the chance of more damage from lava flows - we look at what lies behind the assumptions and what countermeasures can be taken.

programme.title: E6058-020
programme.desc: Sato Taku (Graphic designer) visits Miyazaki. The crowded signs of local bars inspire Sato to reconsider the conventions of modern design, and embrace the appeal of the unknown.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. programme.title: E3 - Magic Pets Football Fun!
programme.desc: Join Morphle, Mila, and Jordie as they face off against the Magic Pets in a wild soccer match! With Incra and Telepup using their powers, Team Morphle will have to get creative to win the trophy. It’s a magical, winner-take-all game!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E3 - Gentle Lessons & Bedtime
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some gentle lessons & soothing bedtime songs. First, Twinkle learns about the importance of eating healthy, delicious fruit, like bananas, oranges & grapes. Then, help her find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make! After a long day of learning, it's time to get ready for bed. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.title: E3 - Baby John is Growing Up!
programme.desc: Being little can be tough, but Baby John is growing up! First, he thinks he's ready to be big & make all his own decisions, but Mom & Dad help him understand that being little is pretty awesome, too! Then, Mom helps Baby John learn how to express all his different emotions & feelings, from grumpy to happy to proud. When Baby John loses his pacifier, the whole family joins in to help him on the big search!

programme.title: E11 - Baby John’s Football Skills
programme.desc: Join Baby John as he learns how to play soccer! With help from his family, he practices his skills and learns that sharing the ball with friends makes the game even more fun. Get ready to move your body and score the winning goal!

programme.title: E3 - Animal Friends Sports Cup
programme.desc: Join JJ and his animal pals for the Animal Friends Sports Cup! Race in a thrilling go-kart track, learn to get back up when you fall down skiing, and work together to build a fantastic box car racer. With a little encouragement, you can do anything!

programme.title: E9 - Football Fever: Goals & Grooves
programme.desc: Join JJ for a packed day of fun! Compete in a giant soccer match, play basketball against animal friends, and hit a home run in baseball. Then, put on your detective hat to solve the mystery of the ten missing buses. It’s a day of sports and fun!

programme.title: E3 - Magic Pets Football Fun!
programme.desc: Join Morphle, Mila, and Jordie as they face off against the Magic Pets in a wild soccer match! With Incra and Telepup using their powers, Team Morphle will have to get creative to win the trophy. It’s a magical, winner-take-all game!

The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Listen as Twinkle & Mr. Moon sing a soothing nighttime lullaby to help you relax & drift off to sleep.

programme.title: E4 - A Big Day of Imagination & Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of imagination & play with Mia & Max! First, they decide to let their imagination run free & build a big dollhouse, but Max has more fun pretending to be a dinosaur that knocks it down! Then, Daddy & Twinkle show the kids how much fun can be had with shadow puppets, making all sorts of different animal shapes. The imaginative fun continues as they turn five empty green bottles into fuzzy-armed monsters that Twinkle brings to life!

programme.title: E10 - Sleepy Time with Twinkle
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. It presents 360 degree profiles of industry movers and shakers, tech mavericks and policymakers, and drills down on the stories behind their success, to give you clarity on what's happening in every facet of business.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country's culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: Fun With Okinawa Dialects
programme.desc: Get familiar with Okinawa dialects by listening to folk tales and children's songs.

programme.title: News & Weather
programme.desc: The latest up-to-date news and nationwide weather information.

programme.title: Drama Serial 'The Scent Of The Wind' Week 13
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: With Mother
programme.desc: This children's program includes a puppet show, cartoon, music, and gymnastics in which children can participate.

programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: Tokoro-San's Pursuit Of Truth
programme.desc: An informational program that reveals Japan as it is by following incidents posted on local media such as local newspapers and business presses.

programme.title: Let's Enjoy English And Meets The World
programme.desc: Children search for wonders worldwide and challenge themselves to communicate with foreigners in English through puppet shows, games, animation, and more. Have fun and learn English naturally with a witch, Kyary Pamyu Pamyu!

programme.title: Great Traverse Taiwan: Crossing The Ultimate Sky Route
programme.desc: Adventurer Tanaka Yoki embarks on a new challenge. In Taiwan-an island the size of Kyushu with over 200 peaks exceeding 3,000 meters, including Yushan, taller than Mount Fuji-he traverses from east to west along perilous high-altitude routes. Beyond the hardships awaits a breathtaking world of vast cloud seas and sweeping mountain panoramas, reminding him of his own smallness. As his journey moves beyond Japan, a new chapter of his adventure unfolds. What lies beyond the finish line?

programme.title: Cold War (Director's Cut)
programme.desc: Approaching midnight in Hong Kong, police headquarters receives an anonymous call: a police van carrying the advanced equipment and five officers has disappeared off the grid...

programme.title: Dongji Rescue
programme.desc: DONG JI ISLAND follows the tragic tale of a Japanese warship secretly transporting British prisoners of war and mistakenly attacked near the easternmost waters of China. To rescue the desperately trapped prisoners, a group of courageous islanders embark on a perilous journey against all odds to the sinking ship, facing relentless Japanese soldiers and the harsh, unforgiving seas...

programme.title: E5 - The Mime Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is encouraging the Squirrels to come outside by gesturing through the window. They don't understand what he's doing and think it's funny. When he comes inside, he explains that he was miming.

programme.title: E6 - The Why Badge
programme.desc: Why do my feet hurt?', Tag asks Duggee. While Duggee has a think, he tells them 'why' is a great question, and the Squirrels are quick to follow up.

programme.title: E8 - The Monster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to help Plinky find her scary side. Fortunately, Duggee has his monster badge.

programme.title: E9 - The Diary Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels find a dusty, old book behind a cupboard... it's Duggee's diary from when he was a teenager! The Squirrels are keen to write diaries of their own.

programme.title: E21 - Splash Dash
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.desc: What's that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It's the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.desc: Duggee looks all around, but can he find the Squirrels? Let's play Hide and Seek!

programme.title: E201 - Explorer / Happy Parky / Storm
programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone. // Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever. // When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.title: E1104 - Pups Save Helga And The Humsquatch / Pups Save The Missing Bone-Stone
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger is getting dressed for a special day with his Hummy Mummy. // The Museum has a brand-new exhibit: the Emerald Bone-Stone! But when the precious bone goes missing.

programme.title: E203 - Beach Scanner / Tidy / Pets
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach. // Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin. // Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: E407 - Rise Of The Sub-Zero Sub / Balloon Bonanza
programme.desc: Baron Bite steals a submarine from Sir Steel and turns it into a Sub-Zero Sub giving him freedom! // The Deer Squad's planet powers bring Trick Alien's giant balloon animals to life.

programme.title: E409 - The Crew Builds A Pancake Cafe / The Crew Builds An Airplane Wash
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew wants to make the biggest pancake ever! But it's a sticky situation when Speed Meister wants to beat them to it. // When Camila's plane gets dirty from leading migrating ducks home, the pups find a way to wash the plane... in the sky!

programme.title: E206 - Tickets
programme.desc: Tim & Kai compete to get Terri's spare Space-Land ticket.

programme.title: E210 - Barbazoo's Diary / The Great Reporter
programme.desc: Barbazoo have plenty of things to write about in his diary! // After reading the biography of Nellie Bly, Barbalib is determined to become a Great Reporter!

programme.title: E212 - The Crew Builds A Ballpark / The Crew Builds A Surf Bridge
programme.desc: When Rubble's favorite baseball star Aaron Judge can't get out of town to the home run derby, Rubble & Crew build a stadium to hold the derby right in Builder Cove! // Surf's up for Rubble & Crew! Well, if they can get over the super hot sand, it is.

programme.title: E701 - Sparkle's Big Rescue
programme.desc: When Crusher sends Blaze away with one of his latest cheats, Blaze's little sister Sparkle comes to save the day and bring her brother back in time so they can race together to win the Teamwork Trophy!

programme.desc: Peppa and George are going to daycare. It's George's first day at daycare, and he shows the class his interest in dinosaurs.

programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile joins gymnastics club because Daisy loves it. // Mr. Crocodile and Daisy help Gigi and Roland find separate homes when they don't want to share a tree anymore.

programme.title: E204 - Dreams And Illusions / Dreaming Apprentices
programme.desc: While everyone sleeps peacefully, one may wonder what the Barbababies could be dreaming about. // To dream makes you grow... But what can Barbidur, Barbalala, Barbotine and Barbidou possibly dream of?

programme.desc: The Rex family go on a road trip through the galaxy to get to Rocket World // Tim & Kai compete to get Terri's spare Space-Land ticket // Tim, Tia & Tommy decide to put on a talent show, but then they can't decide who should go first...

programme.desc: The Rex family go on a road trip through the galaxy to get to Rocket World // Tim & Kai compete to get Terri's spare Space-Land ticket // Tim, Tia & Tommy decide to put on a talent show, but then they can't decide who should go first...

programme.title: BMW Charity Pro-Am presented by TD SYNNEX
E1 - Legendary Predators (Lions)
programme.desc: Coyote explores the power of lions and asks: Would you hold paws with the King of the Jungle?

programme.title: E2 - Speed and Showdown (Cheetah & Jaguar)
programme.desc: Witness a meeting with a cheetah and the ultimate showdown between a jaguar and a caiman.

programme.title: E1 - Legendary Predators (Lions)
programme.desc: Coyote explores the power of lions and asks: Would you hold paws with the King of the Jungle?

programme.title: E2 - Speed and Showdown (Cheetah & Jaguar)
programme.desc: Witness a meeting with a cheetah and the ultimate showdown between a jaguar and a caiman.

programme.title: E9 - Whitetail Deer & Cranberries
programme.desc: Daniel and Avani harvest cranberries on a floating peat moss island, and they find some long range hunting in the dense Northeastern deer woods.

programme.title: E5 - Beaux Beauxs at the Hobo Hilton
programme.desc: Whether you call them Pouldeau, American Coot, or Water Chickens, chances are you don’t consider them a delicacy. However, Jean-Paul is out to prove that these abundant birds have a place at the dinner table. Tune in as thew crew makes some incredible gumbo while preparing for their last hunt at Duck Camp.

programme.title: E6 - Bayou Meets Land
programme.desc: It's the final day at Duck Camp for Jean-Paul and the guys. They finish up their trip with a morning of hunting followed by an afternoon filled with crawfish and catfish. The trip ends on dry land and the crew reflects on what makes the duck camp so special.

programme.title: E10 - Spices Of The Fenua, An Invitation To Travel
programme.desc: Some spices arrived in Tahiti by chance, along the routes of travel. Others are grown locally. All of them, in any case, play a major role in local cuisine and in recipes passed down from generation to generation.

programme.title: E4 - Wendy's Ark
programme.desc: Wendy Pichard heads La Bouche qui rit, the first refuge for farm animals in French speaking Switzerland. Pigs, horses, donkeys, goats, sheep... With her team, she rescues and cares for abused animals or those destined for slaughter.

programme.title: E1 - The Pre-Alps
programme.desc: Created in 2012 to ensure its preservation and sustainable development, the Prealpes d'Azur Regional Nature Park covers ninety thousand hectares. Its wide-ranging altitude and its dual climate, Alpine and Mediterranean, have shaped exceptional landscapes. Today, it is recognized as a global biodiversity hotspot.

programme.title: E20 - The Colors Of The Esterel
programme.desc: It is a jewel with the look of a Grand Canyon. 250 million years ago, the volcanic massif of the Esterel separated from Africa when the Mediterranean was forming. Between Cannes and Saint-Tropez, the Esterel covers the south-east of the Var and extends into the Alpes-Maritimes. Cliffs, forests, sea, its landscapes are astonishing...

programme.desc: Discovery in the Namur region of a renovation focused on increasing the energy efficiency of the house.

programme.title: Irene Khan, Un Special Rapporteur On Freedom Of Expression And Opinion
programme.desc: In a conversation with Liz Shoo, Irene Khan shares her view on the status of freedom of opinion and expression around the world. The UN Special Rapporteur talks about where this right is under pressure and where there are signs of improvement. programme.desc: 由吳彥祖擔任「風華投資人」，集結井朧、代旭、沙一汀、周柯宇、常華森、董思成、謝依霖等常駐嘉賓，在杭州西湖邊的青春潮飲生活店，共同完成15天的運營任務，探索興趣社交的潮流生活方式。

programme.title: E1 - Sirga, Loki and Hugger
programme.desc: Walk on the wild side with Sirga the lion, whose human pal, Val, has been by her side since she was an orphaned cub. See Loki the raven entertain his BFF Elliott, cuddle with Hugger the stingray, and see why Trish and Garri the koala are like family.

programme.title: E3 - Rocco, Harold and Cindy
programme.desc: Follow Shanet, who spends her days tending to the needs of Harold Custard the rockhopper penguin, and feel the love as Barista cares for Cindy the baboon in her golden years. Later, say an emotional goodbye as Rocco the wombat returns to the wild.

programme.title: E4 - Milton, Cash and Bentley
programme.desc: Celebrate Cash the house donkey’s birthday, then play hide-and-seek with Milton the skunk. Meet Bjornar the beaver, who has a very important job, and explore the importance of cuddles and naps with Bentley the tree kangaroo and his human mum.

programme.title: E6 - Australian Spring Fever
programme.desc: Celebrate the first day of spring with Aussie creatures looking for either a dinner or a date. From the kangaroos in the grasslands to the koalas in the trees to the freshwater crocodiles, they hunt for food or fight for breeding rights.

programme.title: E7 - Madagascar: Lizards and Lemurs
programme.desc: Meet the unique primates and reptiles searching for water and dodging predators, from ring-tailed lemurs in the east coast rainforests to tiny brown leaf chameleons, in this land of extreme climate variations and habitats.

programme.title: E9 - Giant Otter Refuge
programme.desc: Join biologists on a hike through a giant otter refuge in the southern Pantanal. Will they find these shy, elusive animals or just the evidence of their day-to-day lives? On the trail, check in on amorous tapirs and water-loving Muscovy ducks.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.desc: Celebrate Cash the house donkey’s birthday, then play hide-and-seek with Milton the skunk. Meet Bjornar the beaver, who has a very important job, and explore the importance of cuddles and naps with Bentley the tree kangaroo and his human mum.

programme.title: E6 - Australian Spring Fever
programme.desc: Celebrate the first day of spring with Aussie creatures looking for either a dinner or a date. From the kangaroos in the grasslands to the koalas in the trees to the freshwater crocodiles, they hunt for food or fight for breeding rights.

programme.title: E7 - Madagascar: Lizards and Lemurs
programme.desc: Meet the unique primates and reptiles searching for water and dodging predators, from ring-tailed lemurs in the east coast rainforests to tiny brown leaf chameleons, in this land of extreme climate variations and habitats.

programme.title: E9 - Giant Otter Refuge
programme.desc: Join biologists on a hike through a giant otter refuge in the southern Pantanal. Will they find these shy, elusive animals or just the evidence of their day-to-day lives? On the trail, check in on amorous tapirs and water-loving Muscovy ducks.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story

programme.desc: Fashion, food, sport, urban culture, lifestyle... The artist Richard Orlinski explores the French touch. Between Dakar, London and Montreal, he meets a new generation of creators and puts the spotlight on a bold and uninhibited French-speaking world.

programme.desc: The Albert-Kahn museum unveils the banker's humanist project. Sometimes called ''the time folder'', Simone Pheulpin works with cotton ribbon. For his first show at Dries Van Noten, Julian Klausner plays with textures and colours. Sophie Brillouet's studio is alive with beach air.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Emmy Award-nominated “Late Night with Seth Meyers,” hosted by award-winning writer and performer Seth Meyers, is home to incisive humor, topical jokes and A-list celebrity guests. The series' signature “A Closer Look” segment has garnered millions of views and is widely lauded for its tightly written and thoughtful approach to analyzing and satirizing news of the day.

programme.title: CNBC Explains
programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains' is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. Each episode unpacks complex business and economic topics, breaking them down into clear, compelling narratives. With expert insights, data-driven visuals and a global perspective, this series helps viewers understand not just what is happening, but why it matters.

programme.title: Executive Decisions
programme.desc: ‘Executive Decisions' is a CNBC podcast offering a rare window into the minds of top decision-makers. Hosted by Steve Sedgwick, each episode explores the pivotal choices that shape the careers and legacies of business leaders and policymakers. Through candid conversations about risk, doubt and conviction, the series reminds us that even the most powerful face uncertainty and trade-offs.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon

programme.title: Tubig To Handle
programme.desc: Get ready to get soaked! 💦 Experience the wettest, wildest, and wackiest game show in the Philippines - Tubig To Handle!. Watch as fearless contestants dive headfirst into epic water obstacle challenges, face hilarious wipeouts, and battle it out for BIG prizes. From slippery slides to heart-pumping showdowns, every episode is packed with non-stop action, laughter, and pure Pinoy fun. Hosted by Yassi Pressman and your favorite stars, this splash-filled adventure is guaranteed to bring nonstop laughter, thrills, and all-out water fun like never before!

programme.title: Huling Akyat Sa Torre[Live]
programme.desc: Presented by ABS-CBN News Documentaries, in celebration of ABS-CBN's 80th founding anniversary, “Huling Akyat sa Torre” (Last Ascent Up the Tower) is a 2026 documentary that zooms in on a structure that has come to symbolize the company -the Millennium Tower. Beyond its link to the history, rise, and trials of “the Philippines' largest network”, the tower is seen from the eyes of the men who have touched and climbed its heights. Journalist Anjo Bagaoisan interviews current and former engineers and technicians of their memories working with the tower that have made their mark in nearly 40 years of Philippine history. The documentary is narrated by veteran journalist and ABS-CBN News anchor Tony Velasquez.

The Banquet
programme.desc: “The Banquet” assembled star-studded cast that aimed for charity to support disaster relief efforts at that time. Adapted from the 1959 Cantonese film of the same name and co-directed by Tsui Hark, Clifton Ko, Joe Cheung, and Alfred Cheung, the film tells the story of a greedy couple deceiving their estranged father to secure a huge amount business deal with oil producing country. While they pretend to welcome the father into their home and prepare a birthday banquet for him, rival also throws a competing banquet...With continuous top-star cameos offering countless surprises and laughs, this film remains remarkable, entertaining and meaningful to audience nowadays.

programme.title: Story Of Kennedy Town
programme.desc: The rough and tough Kennedy Town. And three young men, Chiang, Peng and Wei, came to the scene. Chiang and Wei help Peng to become a policeman. Chiang and Wei also provide the information which enables Peng to crack a few cases. Then Chiang and Wei kill a gangster by accident. Chiang decides to surrender himself to Peng and jail. Peng, however, takes over Chiang's girlfriend. Chiang comes out from jail, Peng plots to get rid of all gangland chief, Chiang and Wei inclusive...

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 資訊工程學系和模特兒系意外合併，燃起了一段閃耀的青春戀情。人氣網紅模特兒姜敏學和對愛情一無所知的優等生朱妍山，成為了新合併系的宣傳模特兒。他們個性上的碰撞，成就了一個溫馨爆笑的愛情故事。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。
